description: The Chinook music store database is open in LibreOffice Base. Your goal is to identify inactive customers for a marketing campaign. Identify customers whose most recent invoice date is strictly before January 1, 2013. Create and populate a new table named InactiveCustomers containing their CustomerId (Integer), FirstName (Text/Varchar), LastName (Text/Varchar), Email (Text/Varchar), LastPurchaseDate (Date or Timestamp), and LifetimeValue (Numeric/Decimal representing the sum of all their invoice totals). Save the database to ensure all changes are recorded.
